_meta.purpose: 48-configuration sweep over the COLA dial space, anchored to Highley's guidance: 'minimize max years between conference finals appearances'. See paper/sections/03-cola-family.tex Definition 2 for the seven-dial schema.

E.16-tiered: NBA 3-2-1 proposal pool: 10 non-playoff non-play-in + 4 record-9/10 + 2 7v8 losers

C.150: Capped COLA default per Highley Substack

requires_source_modification: S (carry-over scope; currently unbounded by ZenGM)
W (lottery weighting; currently L_i/P for top-4 + rank-order for rest)
zengm_mapping_notes.rationale: ZenGM ships one COLA configuration (matches Classic). Sweeping the dials requires patching src/worker/core/draft/cola.ts and src/common/constants.ts at each step. See DIAL_MAPPING.md.

_sensitivity_protocol.purpose: Verify the Pareto frontier is not an artefact of 50-season Monte Carlo noise. Re-run a 4-config subset (Classic, Capped@150, 3-2-1 baseline, unbounded@22) at each of {30, 100} to compare frontiers.
_sensitivity_protocol.seed_strategy: Fixed seed per (config_id, replicate_id). PRNG state captured in the run manifest for reproducibility.
